sourceContractRefs.use: Generate synchronous operation stubs and response/problem models.
Generate typed event listener interfaces for notifications and long-running jobs.
Bind agent-safe operation affordances and autonomy posture.
Generate problem-code enums and retry/approval behavior.

bootstrapSequence: execute only through public operation methods
execute only through public operation methods

boundaryAssertions.assertion: Generated SDK methods must map to operationIds listed in the public application surface manifest.
Generated SDK must not contain direct mutation helpers for assertion store, materialization store, promotion state, authority state, or pack activation state.
boundaryAssertions.testHint: Search generated artifacts for forbidden method and path fragments.

boundaryAssertions.assertion: Every high-consequence SDK execute method must expose or require preflight/dry-run when the public operation descriptor requires it.
boundaryAssertions.testHint: Check descriptor preflightRequired=true methods have a paired preflight method in SDK shape.

boundaryAssertions.assertion: Problem handling must branch on registered reason codes, not message text.
boundaryAssertions.testHint: Generated problem enum must include registry codes and no generated switch may use RuntimeProblem.detail.

boundaryAssertions.assertion: Async listeners should be generated from AsyncAPI and preserve candidate/stale/disputed/result-qualification states.
boundaryAssertions.testHint: Event payload tests include import candidate, materialization invalidated, and output assembly blocked events.

notes: Candidate Phase 7 SDK/codegen rules; implementation support only.
